particulars.description: Legal mortgage over the property, 21 holts crest way, leeds, LS12 2AH registered at the land registry under title number YY43772 (part) - including fixed charges over (1) all plant and machinery owned by the borrower and its interest in any plant & machinery in its possession located at the property (2) all fixtures and fittings attached to the property (3) all chattels of the borrower located at the property and not ordinarily disposed of in the ordinary course of business (4) all benefits in respect of the insurances (including all claims & the refund of any premiums) (5) all rent receivables from any lease granted to the property (6) all the goodwill of the borrower's business carried on at the property.

Legal mortgage over the property 58 holts crest way, leeds, LS12 2AG registered at land registry under title number YY43772 (part).. Including fixed charges over (1) all plant and machinery owned by the borrower and its interest in any plant & machinery in its possession located at the property (2) all fixtures and fittings attached to the property (3) all chattels of the borrower located at the property and not ordinarily disposed of in the ordinary course of business (4) all benefits in respect of the insurances (including all claims & the refund of any premiums). (5) all rents receivable from any lease granted of the property (6) all the goodwill of the borrower/s business carried on at the property.

This is a memorandum of deposit over cash whereby the depositor ("2BHENNA limited") with full title guarantee and as a continuing security for the payment and discharge of all the "liabilities"(known as all indebtedness, liabilities and obligations referred to in clause 2 'covenant to pay' section of the memorandum of deposit) hereby in favour of the bank by way of first fixed charge the deposit and each and every debt represented by the deposit.. The depositor has agreed to deposit with the bank at its office at unit 1, wells road business centre, wells road, ilkley the sum of £10,000.00 and all other sums from time to time standing to the depositor's credit on the depositor's account designated as "cash deposit account", held with the ilkley branch of the bank or any deposit account with the bank, together with any interest from time to time accruing from the deposit.. In summary, all the company's liabilities to svenska handelsbanken ab (publ) of any kind and in any currency (whether present or future, actual or contingent and whether incurred alone or jointly with another) including banking charges, commission, interest, costs and expenses.. Please note that this is by no means and exhaustive list - please refer to the memorandum of deposit dated the 5TH of february 2016 for further details.

Continuing security by way of a fixed charge over the following assets of the company:- (1) all estate or interests in any freehold or leasehold property in england and wales now vested in the borrowers name or future vested in the borrower's name (2) all other interests belonging to it in or over land or the proceeds of sale of land and all licences now or in the future held by it to enter on or us eland (3) the benefit of all other agreements relating to the property to which it is or may become a party or otherwise entitled (3) all plant and machinery owned by the borrower and any interest in the plant and machinery (4) all shares and related rights (5) insurances, claims and refund of premiums (6) rights under the appointment of any managing agent of any of the borrower's properties (7) deposits (8) company's book debts, other debts and prepayments and their proceeds, security interests, collateral instruments and other rights connected (9) all goodwill and uncalled capital (10) benefit of all authorisations connected with company's business or the use of any charged assets together with the recovery and received of compensation connected to such authorisation or charged assets.
